creator: ralph@lr.los-gatos.ca.us
text:
Bug report sent to bug-bash@gnu.org using the bashbug tool. I copied the information from this bug report. If I get any feedback from it, I'll update here.

In the meantime, my FreeBSD system was upgraded, and is now running bash 5.2-15 on FreeBSD 13.2 (now only in 64-bit amd64 mode), and the bug no longer exists. So it must have been fixed upstream already, perhaps inadvertently.
